section_miscategorizations.text: Physical exam reveals mild tenderness to palpation over the lateral epicondyle of the left elbow.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The objective finding of tenderness is over the lateral epicondyle, but the assessment diagnoses medial epicondylitis. This is more a clinical inconsistency than a section misplacement; the content type (exam finding) is correctly in O.

section_miscategorizations.text: A cervical MRI is planned to rule out other causes of neck pain.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is correctly a plan item (an order), but it addresses neck pain, which is not described in S or O. The mismatch is conceptual rather than a section misplacement; as an order it belongs in P.
